case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER & ORDER SETTING ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND EXONERATE BAIL ORDERED THAT EXECUTION ON THE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AGAINST BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS AND NATIONAL AUTO & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY ON SURETY BOND NO. MM300658 IS STAYED TO JUNE 4, 1996 FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER & ORDER STAYING COLLECTION ON SUMMARY JUDGMENT STAYED PENDING UNTIL THE MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS FINAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR AUG-28-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTOMOBILE & CASUALTY INSURANCE CO. BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,083.00, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 501, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF JAN-06-1998, DENIED FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR NOV-15-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
IT IS ORDERED THAT THE COLLECTION AND EXECUTION OF THE SUMMARY JUDGEMENT IN THIS CASE STAYED UNTIL 2-28-97 - GRANTE D - JUDGE DESMOND. FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR JAN-06-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501
